title: pelargonium × filifolium
intro: Pelargonium × filifolium, also known as Mountain Geranium or Red Tip Geranium, is a hybrid species of the Pelargonium genus, which is a group of flowering plants in the family Geraniaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are due to the presence of compounds such as geraniol and linalool. The health benefits of Pelargonium × filifolium include relief from sore throats, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its use as an antiseptic to treat wounds and cuts. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
